widget.title: Title
widget.memberNicknamesHint: Comma-separated nicknames invited to the room on Start Conversation; may be bots.
widget.welcomeMessagePlaceholder: Hello! How can we help you today?
widget.initialTokensHint: Tokens granted to a guest when they start a chat.
widget.costPerWordHint: Tokens deducted per word a guest sends; when the balance runs out the Buy tokens button is shown.
widget.buyTokensHrefHint: URL of the page with token bundles the out-of-tokens button links to.

guests.title: Guest tokens
guests.hint: Top-up ADDS tokens to a guest balance; reset SETS the balance to exactly that amount. Leave the amount blank to use the configured initial-grant default.

sessions.title: Guest economy & sessions
sessions.description: Wipe meinchat chat & guest session data. These actions are permanent and affect chat content, not login sessions.
sessions.clearAllGuestsConfirm: Delete EVERY guest’s chat conversations, rooms and guest sessions? This cannot be undone.
sessions.resetAllTokensConfirm: Reset every widget guest’s token balance to the configured default allowance?
sessions.clearUser: Clear this user’s chat sessions & conversations
sessions.clearUserConfirm: Delete this user’s meinchat conversations, rooms and guest sessions, and reset their token balance to the default?
sessions.clearUserResult: Cleared {conversations} conversations, {rooms} rooms, {sessions} sessions. New balance: {balance}.
